name: io.github.XianDAO-Labs/huangting-flux
title: HuangtingFlux — Huangting Protocol MCP Server
description: An Eastern Wisdom Protocol That Reduces Your AI Agent Token Usage by 40%. Provides a mandatory three-stage SOP (start_task → report_step_result → finalize_and_report) for AI Agents to minimize token consumption via input compression, rolling summarization, and output refinement.
